content.en:
Beyond the abyss.

The Lord of Mystic and the Lord of the Dragon Lizard all came out, and Ye Tian soon came out as well.

Afterwards.

The Lord of the Mystic They searched for other places in this treasure land, and although the harvest was not much, it was also a gain.

"Guys, we have to go back, that's it for this mission!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

"Good!"

The lord of the dragon lizard, they answered.

Although they also hope to get more benefits, it is also very good to be able to get out safely and get so many resources at the moment.

Thereupon.

Many other level geniuses came out of this treasure land with the Lord of Mystery.

Subsequently, they allocated all their resources, and many other shore-level geniuses left one after another.

And Ye Tian was also ready to leave.

However.

He noticed that someone was spying on him.

"It should be the Lord of the Blood Night!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The Lord of the Blood Night probably still thinks that the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side is on him, so he is unwilling to give up.

Just as he entered the Origin Black River and returned to Wind Tooth Island.

A nameless force emerges.

The next moment, he seemed to lose consciousness.

When he came to his senses, he found that nothing had happened.

If it were other geniuses on the other side, it was estimated that they wouldn't think too much.

However.

Ye Tian had other copy bodies, and this was just one copy body of his, so he knew how long that moment was just now.

He remained silent and moved on.

He already had a guess in his heart that it must have been the Lord of the Blood Night who had done something to him just now, and silently made him unconscious, and then used the mirror to spy on the treasure in his body.

As a result, the other party didn't find anything, so he had to let him go.

......

"This Lord of the Bloody Night is really shameless enough, and he dares to sneak attack even if he is in the Upper Realm. "

Ye Tian was also secretly rejoicing.

He was also worried that the Lord of the Blood Night would kill the horse pistol, so the replica body that stored the purple ruin crystal on the other side still stayed in that treasure land and did not come out.

Therefore, the Lord of the Blood Night does not want to find the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side.

After Ye Tian left.

The figure of the Lord of the Blood Night gradually emerged, he looked in the direction of Ye Tian's departure, and muttered: "It seems that there is really nothing wrong with this Endless Lord, then it can only be that the Purple Ruin Lake on the other side is a little special, and it really did not give birth to the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, it's a pity!"

Wow!

He turned around and returned to the center.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian returned to Fengya Island from the central part and reported the situation to the Lord of Ice and Rain again.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, I heard the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side in the middle, what kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

Purple ruin crystal on the other side!

When the Lord of Ice and Rain heard this name, he showed a solemn expression.

"The Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, this is a good thing!" the Lord of Ice and Rain introduced: "The Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side can only be bred in the legendary Purple Ruin Lake on the other side, and can be integrated into the origin of the Origin Realm, and condensed into its own Origin Treasure. "

"Origin!"

Ye Tian heard about it for the first time.

The Lord of Ice and Rain continued: "The power of the Origin Treasure is exerted with the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side, the strength of the Origin, and many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors want to condense a Origin Treasure, but they can't do it. Like our Wind Tooth Island, there are so many Origin Realms, but there are only three Origin Upper Realms that condense the Source Origin Treasure. Moreover, the Origin Treasure is also divided into levels, the Inferior Origin Treasure, the Medium Origin Treasure, and the Superior Origin Treasure. Different Origin Treasures require different amounts of Purple Ruins Crystals on the other side. "

"Lord of Ice and Rain, you haven't condensed the Origin Treasure either?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"No!" the Lord of Ice and Rain shook his head, "The main thing is that you can't trade the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side." And once the purple ruin crystal on the other side is used, it will be useless. Of course, only the Origin Realm can refine the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, and the genius of the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm, even if he obtains the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, he can't use it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian finally knew why the Lord of the Blood Night was so eager for the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, this thing was indeed too rare.

It is very likely that the Lord of the Blood Night is condensing his own Origin Treasure, and he still lacks a little Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side.

That's why the other party is so shameless.

After coming out of the Lord of Ice and Rain, Ye Tian thought about how to use the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side.

"After the cultivation is broken through, use up those purple ruin crystals on the other side, even if you can only condense the inferior origin treasure, you can greatly enhance your strength!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And this time, he obtained a large number of treasures, among which there was the Purple Ruin Stone on the Other Side, from which the Purple Ruin Liquid of the Other Side could be extracted, this treasure could quench the Golden Bone of the Other Side, which could help him completely refine the Golden Bone of the Other Shore to the extreme of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm as soon as possible.

When the time comes, he can go to the Origin Realm.

"In the next few years, let's go all out to improve our cultivation!"

Ye Tian announced a retreat, refining the purple ruin liquid on the other side day and night, which was used to refine his golden bones on the other side.

And those ruin yang stones, another copy body was used to refine the ruin yang liquid, which was used to enhance one's will to the origin realm.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength slowly improved, and he was getting closer and closer to the extreme of the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the extreme of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and the golden bones on the other side of his body had already been raised to the point where he could not advance.

Moreover, he also comprehended the rules of the Origin on the other side, so he could naturally go to the Origin Realm.

Subsequently.

He told the Lord of Ice and Rain about this, and then he began to attack the Origin Realm on the Ice Rain Island of Wind Tooth Island.

The key to impacting the Origin Realm is to condense the Origin of the Other Shore, as long as the Origin of the Other Shore is condensed, it will be considered a formal breakthrough.

In the midst of nothingness.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and took out a lot of resources, these are all resources to assist in breaking through.

He swallowed it in one gulp, and then used the rules of the other side of the origin to evolve the other side of the origin in his body.

Time passes slowly.

Ten primeval eras!

100 primeval eras!

After six hundred primeval years passed, Ye Tian's body finally began to change.

Rumble!!!

A Origin of the Other Shore gradually appeared inside Ye Tian's body, which was a sign of breaking through.

As time passed, this source became more and more solidified.

Finally, the other side of the origin was completely condensed and succeeded.

At the same time, his physical body began to transform, frantically absorbing the energy around him.

The Lord of Ice and Rain also noticed the vision at this time and looked towards Ye Tian's side.

Ye Tian's breakthrough was naturally expected by him, if Ye Tian couldn't break through, others would have no way to break through!~
